posts.author: jack_rowley (Jack Rowley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I’m trying to automate part of our process for when a Won Sales Lead Turns into a Project we’re working on.

Source Board Items

unnamed1729×80 14.8 KB

Source Board Automation

unnamed1773×527 33.3 KB

Everything with automation works fine, but it won’t move one of the columns. The item in question has two Connect Boards Columns with the same settings in both the source and target boards. When the Item moves across, it’ll move one of the Connect Board Columns, but not the other?

Target Board Result

Screenshot - 2024-02-26T111401.6621593×113 12.7 KB

There is no option in the automation to ensure that the Target Connect Boards column is being populated by the correct source column.

Source Board Automation Item Column Targeting

Screenshot - 2024-02-26T112821.243614×631 29.7 KB

Screenshot - 2024-02-26T112846.418616×641 29.7 KB

Screenshot - 2024-02-26T112901.098627×641 29.6 KB

I’ve ran out of things to try, please advise me what I’m doing wrong!

Thanks,

Jack

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jack,

Thanks for flagging this!

I have tested this on my end and having run into any issues here.

Just to clarify, the 2 connect board columns exist on both the source board and target board and the boards connected in the source board, match those connected in the target board? In addition, are there any other boards connected in the problematic connect board column?

Thanks for your help on this
